title: Secret Bathroom
body:
!!!! I know what we have to do!

Monogon or Alora WILL come for the office and we WILL be caught. We can’t let our work be confiscated… But if we flush it into the city sewage and recycling then it could be safe.

Even if we can’t retrieve the plates or drag them to the void, the Trash Handlers won't be able to delete them, they’re undefined data wrapped in void energy. Worst case scenario the plates will take root and begin sprouting. This will either create results we can observe or buy us enough time to copy them and get out!

- Unknown
‎
